---
title: "CR Cancer Proteomics - MUSCLE"
output:
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
    theme: flatly
runtime: shiny
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(shiny)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)

base_dir <- normalizePath(file.path(dirname(getwd()), ".."), mustWork = TRUE)
muscle_dir <- file.path(base_dir, "05_analysis", "b_results")
plasma_dir
# --- Load data -----------
# Raw Data
raw_list <- list(
  Muscle = read.csv(file.path(base_dir, 
                              "02_normalization", 
                              "b_reports",
                              "00_raw_sample_summary_muscle.csv"))
)

# Filtering Data
filter_list <- list(
  `CRE v PLA Muscle`  = read.csv(file.path(base_dir, 
                                           "02_normalization", 
                                           "b_reports",
                                           "02_filtering_effects_CRE_muscle.csv")),
  `CRE v PLA Plasma`  = read.csv(file.path(base_dir, 
                                           "02_normalization", 
                                           "b_reports",
                                           "02_filtering_effects_CRE_muscle.csv")),
  `SURV v CTL Muscle` =
  `SURV v CTL Plasma` =
)

# Summary Data
summary_list <- list(
  `CRE v PLA Samples` = read.csv(file.path(base_dir, 
                                           "02_normalization", 
                                           "b_reports",
                                           "12_sample_report_CRE_muscle.csv")),
  `CRE v PLA Proteins` = read.csv(file.path(base_dir, 
                                           "02_normalization", 
                                           "b_reports",
                                           "11_protein_report_CRE_muscle.csv")),
  `SURV v CTL Samples` = read.csv(file.path(base_dir, 
                                           "02_normalization", 
                                           "b_reports",
                                           "12_sample_report_SURV_muscle.csv")),
  `SURV v CTL Proteins` = read.csv(file.path(base_dir, 
                                           "02_normalization", 
                                           "b_reports",
                                           "11_protein_report_SURV_muscle.csv"))
)

# Limma data
results_list <- list(
`Baseline CREvPLA` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 1),
`Training CREvPLA` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 2),
`Training CRE` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 3),
`Training PLA` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 4),
`Interaction (supp)` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 5),
`Baseline SURVvCTL` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 6),
`Training SURVvCTL` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 7),
`Training SURV` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 8),
`Baseline FvM` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 9),
`Training FvM` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 10),
`Training F` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 11),
`Training M` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 12),
`Interaction (sex)` = read_excel(file.path(results_dir, "limma_results_all_muscle.xlsx"), sheet = 13)
)

# Normalized Data (for regressions)


  
```

Data Processing {data-icon="fa-cogs"}
=====================================
Sidebar {.sidebar}
--------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r sidebar1}
# --- Sample selector ---
selectInput("sample",
  label = "Sample",
  choices = c("Muscle", "Plasma"),
  selected = "Muscle")

# --- Dataset selector ---
selectInput("dataset",
  label = "Dataset",
  choices = c("CRE v PLA", "SURV v CTL"),
  selected = "CRE v PLA")
```
Column {data-width=500}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
### Raw Data
```{r rawdata}
DTOutput("raw_table")
```
Column {data-width=500}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
### Filtering
```{r filtering}
DTOutput("filter_table")
```
Data Summary {data-icon="fa-table"}
====================================
Sidebar {.sidebar}
---------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r sidebar2}
# --- Sample selector ---
selectInput("sample",
  label = "Sample",
  choices = c("Muscle", "Plasma"),
  selected = "Muscle")

# --- Dataset selector ---
selectInput("dataset",
  label = "Dataset",
  choices = c("CRE v PLA", "SURV v CTL"),
  selected = "CRE v PLA")

# --- Summary selector ---
selectInput("summary",
  label = "Summary",
  choices = c("Samples", "Proteins"),
  selected = "Samples")
```

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
### Data Summary
```{r table1}
DTOutput("sum_table")
```

Differential Abundance {data-icon="fa-volcano"}
=====================================

Sidebar {.sidebar}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
```{r sidebar3}
# --- Comparison selector ---
selectInput("comparison",
  label    = "Comparison",
  choices  = names(results_list),
  selected = names(results_list)[1]
)

hr()

# --- p-value type ---
radioButtons("pval_type",
  label    = "P-value type",
  choices  = c("Raw p-value" = "P.Value", 
               "Adjusted p-value" = "adj.P.Val",
               "Adjusted Pi-value (Xiao)" = "adj.Pi.Val"),
  selected = "adj.P.Val"
)

# --- Thresholds ---
sliderInput("pval_thresh",
  label = "P-value threshold",
  min = 0.01, max = 0.1, value = 0.05, step = 0.01
)

sliderInput("logfc_thresh",
  label = "|logFC| threshold",
  min = 0, max = 1, value = 0.6, step = 0.1
)

hr()

# --- Optional: colour by significance ---
checkboxInput("colour_sig", "Colour by significance", value = TRUE)
```

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Volcano Plot
```{r volcano}
plotlyOutput("volcano_plot")
```


Column {data-width=350}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Significant Proteins
```{r table}
DTOutput("sig_table")
```

### Summary
```{r summary}
verbatimTextOutput("summary_text")
```


```{r server, context="server"}

# ---- Reactive: filtered dataset ----
dat <- reactive({
  df <- results_list[[input$comparison]]
  df$pval_used <- df[[input$pval_type]]
  df$sig <- df$pval_used < input$pval_thresh & abs(df$logFC) > input$logfc_thresh
  df$direction <- ifelse(!df$sig, "ns",
                    ifelse(df$logFC > 0, "up", "down"))
  df
})

# ---- Volcano plot ----
output$volcano_plot <- renderPlotly({
  df <- dat()
  
  colour_map <- c("up" = "#e63946", "down" = "turquoise3", "ns" = "#adb5bd")
  
  p <- plot_ly(df,
    x = ~logFC,
    y = ~-log10(pval_used),
    type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
    color = if (input$colour_sig) ~direction else I("#adb5bd"),
    colors = colour_map,
    text = ~paste0("<b>", gene, "</b><br>",
                   description, "<br>",
                   "logFC: ", round(logFC, 3), "<br>",
                   "p: ", signif(pval_used, 3)),
    hoverinfo = "text",
    marker = list(size = 6, opacity = 0.75)
  ) %>%
    layout(
      title  = input$comparison,
      xaxis  = list(title = "log2 Fold Change",
                    zeroline = TRUE),
      yaxis  = list(title = paste0("-log10(", input$pval_type, ")")),
      shapes = list(
        # vertical logFC lines
        list(type="line", x0=input$logfc_thresh,  x1=input$logfc_thresh,
             y0=0, y1=1, yref="paper",
             line=list(dash="dot", color="grey")),
        list(type="line", x0=-input$logfc_thresh, x1=-input$logfc_thresh,
             y0=0, y1=1, yref="paper",
             line=list(dash="dot", color="grey")),
        # horizontal p-value line
        list(type="line", x0=0, x1=1, xref="paper",
             y0=-log10(input$pval_thresh), y1=-log10(input$pval_thresh),
             line=list(dash="dot", color="grey"))
      ),
      legend = list(title = list(text = "Direction"))
    )
  p
})

# ---- Significant proteins table ----
output$sig_table <- renderDT({
  dat() %>%
    filter(sig) %>%
    select(description, gene, logFC, pval_used, direction) %>%
    arrange(pval_used) %>%
    rename("Protein" = description, "Gene" = gene, "FC" = logFC,
           "p-value" = pval_used, "Direction" = direction) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~signif(.x, 3))) %>%
    datatable(options = list(pageLength = 10, dom = "tp"),
              rownames = FALSE)
}, server = FALSE)

# ---- Summary text ----
output$summary_text <- renderText({
  df  <- dat()
  up  <- sum(df$direction == "up",   na.rm = TRUE)
  dn  <- sum(df$direction == "down", na.rm = TRUE)
  tot <- nrow(df)
  paste0(
    "Comparison: ",    input$comparison, "\n",
    "Total proteins: ", tot, "\n",
    "Up-regulated: ",   up,  "\n",
    "Down-regulated: ", dn,  "\n",
    "logFC cutoff: ±",  input$logfc_thresh, "\n",
    input$pval_type, " < ", input$pval_thresh
  )
})

# ---- Summary data table ----
make_sample_summary_cre <- function(df) {
  # Pull values
  total    <- df$total_samples
  n_cre_t1 <- df$n_CRE_T1;  n_cre_t2 <- df$n_CRE_T2
  n_pla_t1 <- df$n_PLA_T1;  n_pla_t2 <- df$n_PLA_T2
  n_paired <- df$n_paired * 2
  n_pairs  <- df$n_paired 
  n_unpaired <- df$n_unpaired
  
  # Paired T1/T2 per group = n_paired_CRE / n_paired_PLA each split evenly
  p_cre_t1 <- df$n_paired_CRE;  p_cre_t2 <- df$n_paired_CRE
  p_pla_t1 <- df$n_paired_PLA;  p_pla_t2 <- df$n_paired_PLA
  
  # Unpaired = All - Paired per cell
  u_cre_t1 <- n_cre_t1 - p_cre_t1;  u_cre_t2 <- n_cre_t2 - p_cre_t2
  u_pla_t1 <- n_pla_t1 - p_pla_t1;  u_pla_t2 <- n_pla_t2 - p_pla_t2
  
  tibble::tibble(
    ` `      = c("All", paste0("Paired (", n_pairs, " pairs)"), "Unpaired"),
    `n`      = c(total,   n_paired,   n_unpaired),
    `CRE T1` = c(n_cre_t1, p_cre_t1, u_cre_t1),
    `CRE T2` = c(n_cre_t2, p_cre_t2, u_cre_t2),
    `PLA T1` = c(n_pla_t1, p_pla_t1, u_pla_t1),
    `PLA T2` = c(n_pla_t2, p_pla_t2, u_pla_t2)
  )
}

make_sample_summary_surv <- function(df) {
  # Pull values
  total     <- df$total_samples
  n_surv_t1 <- df$n_CRE_T1 + df$n_PLA_T1
  n_surv_t2 <- df$n_CRE_T2 + df$n_PLA_T2
  n_ctl_t1  <- df$n_CTL   
  n_paired  <- df$n_paired * 2
  n_pairs   <- df$n_paired 
  n_unpaired <- df$n_unpaired
  
  # Paired T1/T2 per group = n_paired_CRE / n_paired_PLA each split evenly
  p_surv_t1 <- df$n_paired  
  p_surv_t2 <- df$n_paired
  p_ctl_t1  <- NA 
  
  # Unpaired = All - Paired per cell
  u_surv_t1 <- n_surv_t1 - p_surv_t1
  u_surv_t2 <- n_surv_t2 - p_surv_t2
  u_ctl_t1 <- n_ctl_t1 
  
  tibble::tibble(
    ` `       = c("All", paste0("Paired (", n_pairs, " pairs)"), "Unpaired"),
    `n`       = c(total,   n_paired,   n_unpaired),
    `SURV T1` = c(n_surv_t1, p_surv_t1, u_surv_t1),
    `SURV T2` = c(n_surv_t2, p_surv_t2, u_surv_t2),
    `CTL T1`  = c(n_ctl_t1, p_ctl_t1, u_ctl_t1)
  )
}

make_protein_summary_cre <- function(df) {
  tibble::tibble(
    ` `          = c("Total Proteins", "Complete Proteins", "Incomplete Proteins"),
    `n`          = c(df$Total, df$Complete, df$Incomplete),
    `% of Total` = c(paste0(round(df$Total / df$Total * 100, 1), "%"),
                     paste0(round(df$Complete / df$Total * 100, 1), "%"),
                     paste0(round(df$Incomplete / df$Total * 100, 1), "%"))
  )
}

make_protein_summary_surv <- function(df) {
  tibble::tibble(
    ` `          = c("Total Proteins", "Complete Proteins", "Incomplete Proteins"),
    `n`          = c(df$Total, df$Complete, df$Incomplete),
    `% of Total` = c(paste0(round(df$Total / df$Total * 100, 1), "%"),
                     paste0(round(df$Complete / df$Total * 100, 1), "%"),
                     paste0(round(df$Incomplete / df$Total * 100, 1), "%"))
  )
}

# Lookup table
summary_builders <- list(
  `CRE v PLA Samples`   = make_sample_summary_cre,
  `CRE v PLA Proteins`  = make_protein_summary_cre,
  `SURV v CTL Samples`  = make_sample_summary_surv,
  `SURV v CTL Proteins` = make_protein_summary_surv
)

output$sum_table <- renderDT({
  key <- paste(input$dataset, input$summary)
  df <- summary_list[[key]] %>% dplyr::select(-1)
  builder <- summary_builders[[key]]
  req(df, builder)
  
  builder(df) %>%
    datatable(
      options  = list(dom = "t", pageLength = 10, ordering = FALSE),
      rownames = FALSE
    )
})
```
